mapper.select: SELECT SESSION_ID AS "sessionId", JOB_CATEGORY AS "jobCategory", TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "createdAt", -- 이력서 내용이 너무 길면 사이드바용으로 앞부분만 잘라서 제공 (선택) DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(RESUME_CONTENT, 40, 1) AS "titleHint" FROM INTERVIEW_SESSIONS WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT DETAIL_ID AS "detailId", SESSION_ID AS "sessionId", QUESTION_TEXT AS "questionText", USER_ANSWER AS "userAnswer", AI_EVALUATION AS "aiEvaluation", SCORE AS "score", SORT_ORDER AS "sortOrder" FROM INTERVIEW_DETAILS WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INTERVIEW_SESSIONS ( SESSION_ID, MEMBER_ID, RESUME_CONTENT, JOB_CATEGORY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{memberId}, #{resumeContent}, #{jobCategory}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO INTERVIEW_DETAILS ( DETAIL_ID, SESSION_ID, QUESTION_TEXT, USER_ANSWER, AI_EVALUATION, SCORE, SORT_ORDER ) VALUES ( SEQ_DETAIL_ID.NEXTVAL, #{sessionId}, #{questionText}, #{userAnswer, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{aiEvaluation, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{score, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sortOrder} )
